TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: "śĚéÁąĺÁéč" . "śĚéÁąĺÁéč"Liewan sakalaluman nu kasinganganan a kakunkuan ni Wilan.Sasepiya. nina tatusaay nida a tataynaan a wawa misakapah,pabeli hantu ni Liewan ku zaysang i tu nuhenian, hida satu sikawaw tu sakalaluman a kawawan. gagikian namakayda i 1605 a mihcaan nisulitan, inakunku' sakamusa namakayda i nakamuan tu Luo-ma tademaw nu zitayan, Pule'den kuowan Lie a kungku, nina ka kungkuan nina kuowan a cudadan, ulic a dadiw atu gagikian idaw tu i Sase-piya a zitayan. sakatusa ni kalepacawan idaw tu kina kakungkuan u sapalutatengaan nu Sasepiya sapatahekalan a natangahan a cudadan. kalaluman a picidekan ni sulitan pasayni i nu tademawan anikalaecu's atu i lalumaan naca a kankian. namusakamu ci Ciawpuona sulit sa:"inai' tu ku hatiniay tu nu tademaw mikikaka ci Lie an misulit tu sakalaluman a gagikian nu sasulitan " balakitu ku mihcaan ni Liewan mangalay tu tadikud, sipabeli kina kanatal tu tuluay a tataynaan a wawa mamin lisilud, sipabali nida ku satabakiay a kawawan tu sakanamuhan nida a tademaw. Kawna-Lie , Liken misadawmi', patinaku tu udaip nu namuh cinidaan mikikaka tu kanatal sa, ci Kuoti'-Liya kaisa misadawmi', sakamusa u ngalay han caay kaw sasakamuen sa, alaw han mapatay nu linges ci Kuowan . ci Liewan mapatay nu linges lawpes hantu nida ku sapilaylayan, benis hantu nida ku kanatal sipabeli ci Kawna-Lie atu ci Liken . sakamusa ci Kente' uynian a kawaw numisu caay palecadi, mibabelih kaku sa. mapatay nu linges ci Lie , pahutin hatu cinida palaliw. ci Lie didawan nida ci Puokenti kuocen atu ci Falansi kuowan , nina tatusaay pasayda namin ci Kuoti'-Liya mikikung kita sa. katinengan satu nuheni ci Kuoti'-Liya inai tu ku sapilaylay tu kawawan, ci Puokenti kuocen miyukiw lawpesen nida ku kakakikunngan, ci Falansi kuowan hantu tada u ngalay nida sisa kikung satu ku nnuhen. mihapu satu ci Lie aytida kaku mueneng i ci Kawna-Lie , ci Liken nan a lalacal han naku mueneng, liwanen numaku ku cacaya a lasubu nu hitay mamin kilul takuwan. ci Kawna-Lie atu ci Liken malalihud kunuheni tatusa, patahekal tu paceba' nu balucu' nuheni, sakamusa ci Lie an u caay henay kaw mamapatay a babalaki sa. mapatay nu linges ci Aydemun u bucud kaku sa, mipalula'cus cinida tu kaka ci Aydecia . pasayda cinida i wama ci Keluosete'-puoce tu tingami, sakamu hanini maanup ci Aydecia tu zaysan. . misanu kalung ci Kaye'se , ci Lie misabaluhayaca tu kalung. maadih nida ci Kawna-Lie mimecmec tu kawaw, caay lihidai cinida. sakamuen nida ciama nida sakapahen ku wayway han, wadaen nida ku mikilulay cinidaan a tademaw. ci Lie mapatay nu linges laliw satu cinida, mikilim ci Liken na. katawaan tu nutaw ci Lie . pacebaan ni Aydemun lalebuan ni Aydecia han, mapaceba' ci Keluosete' , bahbah hantu nida ci Aydecia . . patayda hantu ni Kente' i luma' ni Liken , ci Keluosete'-puoce maadih satu nida ci Awsehuate , masasukayna'h ku nuheni, maadih ni Liken atu acawa nida ci Kanhuae kuocea pakading hantu nida ku kuku'. . katukuh sa ci Lie , kya hidan nuheni ku tawkiyaku sa, caay pitengil ci Liken . mapatay nu linges ci Lie , ahican miwawies sa. tahekal satu ci Kawnalie , atu ci Liken tatusa lalebuen nida ci wama nida. . tabaki ku tuwa' ni Lie , maynah tu tataynaan nida a wawa, katuud ku miadihay i liklik micili. tahekal satu ci Kenta' , mangalay midiput cinidaan. namabaliyan udadan satu, ci Lie saliwdliwd sai senan lincun, malitemuh nida ci misaapaapaay ci Tanmu.Paydelan ci Aydecia ci Aydecia ngaliwngeu sa, ci Lie palula'cus tu tataynaan nida a wawaw, ci Kente' ladayen nida tatusa tayda i papahanhanan nu kakitidaan. tada tabakitu ku cumi, sadikuday satu kinapatay. amapatapatay ci Aydemun kumitaneng cinida pataluman tu kawaw, nika sadikuday ci Lie abibien nida ku kidu ni Kuodiliya . ci Lie matineng tu ci Kente' cinida sa, maliyuh cinida miwanan tu kawaw ni Kayte'se tu kankian. ci Awpenni sakamuen nida ci Kente' atu ci Aydecia taneng tu kamu malasakakaay han. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: "***" . "***"r~…ĺi…ôwan sakar~…ĺar~…ĺuman nu kasiŇčaŇčanan a kakunkuan ni wir~…ĺan.sas…ôpija. nina tatusaaj nida a tatajnaan a wawa misakapańß,pab…ôr~…ĺi ńßantu ni r~…ĺi…ôwan ku zajsaŇč i tu nuńß…ônian, ńßida satu sikawaw tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺuman a kawawan. gagikian namakajda i **** a mińß ¶aan nisur~…ĺitan, inakunku Ē~ ° sakamusa namakajda i nakamuan tu r~…ĺuo-ma tad…ômaw nu zitajan, pur~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °d…ôn kuowan r~…ĺi…ô a kuŇčku, nina ka kuŇčkuan nina kuowan a ¶udadan, ur~…ĺi ¶ a dadiw atu gagikian idaw tu i sas…ô-pija a zitajan. sakatusa ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan idaw tu kina kakuŇčkuan u sapar~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan nu sas…ôpija sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺan a nataŇčańßan a ¶udadan. kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman a pi ¶id…ôkan ni sur~…ĺitan pasajni i nu tad…ômawan anikar~…ĺa…ô ¶u Ē~ °s atu i r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan na ¶a a kankian. namusakamu ¶i ¶iawpuona sur~…ĺit sa:"inai Ē~ ° tu ku ńßatiniaj tu nu tad…ômaw mikikaka ¶i r~…ĺi…ô an misur~…ĺit tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺuman a gagikian nu sasur~…ĺitan " bar~…ĺakitu ku mińß ¶aan ni r~…ĺi…ôwan maŇčar~…ĺaj tu tadikud, sipab…ôr~…ĺi kina kanatar~…ĺ tu tur~…ĺuaj a tatajnaan a wawa mamin r~…ĺisir~…ĺud, sipabar~…ĺi nida ku satabakiaj a kawawan tu sakanamuńßan nida a tad…ômaw. kawna-r~…ĺi…ô , r~…ĺik…ôn misadawmi Ē~ °, patinaku tu udaip nu namuńß ¶inidaan mikikaka tu kanatar~…ĺ sa, ¶i kuoti Ē~ °-r~…ĺija kaisa misadawmi Ē~ °, sakamusa u Ňčar~…ĺaj ńßan ¶aaj kaw sasakamu…ôn sa, ar~…ĺaw ńßan mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶i kuowan . ¶i r~…ĺi…ôwan mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs r~…ĺawp…ôs ńßantu nida ku sapir~…ĺajr~…ĺajan, b…ônis ńßantu nida ku kanatar~…ĺ sipab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i kawna-r~…ĺi…ô atu ¶i r~…ĺik…ôn . sakamusa ¶i k…ônt…ô Ē~ ° ujnian a kawaw numisu ¶aaj par~…ĺ…ô ¶adi, mibab…ôr~…ĺińß kaku sa. mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶i r~…ĺi…ô , pańßutin ńßatu ¶inida par~…ĺar~…ĺiw. ¶i r~…ĺi…ô didawan nida ¶i puok…ônti kuo ¶…ôn atu ¶i far~…ĺansi kuowan , nina tatusaaj pasajda namin ¶i kuoti Ē~ °-r~…ĺija mikikuŇč kita sa. katin…ôŇčan satu nuńß…ôni ¶i kuoti Ē~ °-r~…ĺija inai tu ku sapir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu kawawan, ¶i puok…ônti kuo ¶…ôn mijukiw r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn nida ku kakakikunŇčan, ¶i far~…ĺansi kuowan ńßantu tada u Ňčar~…ĺaj nida sisa kikuŇč satu ku nnuńß…ôn. mińßapu satu ¶i r~…ĺi…ô ajtida kaku mu…ôn…ôŇč i ¶i kawna-r~…ĺi…ô , ¶i r~…ĺik…ôn nan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ ńßan naku mu…ôn…ôŇč, r~…ĺiwan…ôn numaku ku ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺasubu nu ńßitaj mamin kir~…ĺur~…ĺ takuwan. ¶i kawna-r~…ĺi…ô atu ¶i r~…ĺik…ôn mar~…ĺar~…ĺińßud kunuńß…ôni tatusa, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu pa ¶…ôba Ē~ ° nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, sakamusa ¶i r~…ĺi…ô an u ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaw mamapataj a babar~…ĺaki sa. mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶i ajd…ômun u bu ¶ud kaku sa, mipar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ¶inida tu kaka ¶i ajd…ô ¶ia . pasajda ¶inida i wama ¶i k…ôr~…ĺuos…ôt…ô Ē~ °-puo ¶…ô tu tiŇčami, sakamu ńßanini maanup ¶i ajd…ô ¶ia tu zajsan. . misanu kar~…ĺuŇč ¶i kaj…ô Ē~ °s…ô , ¶i r~…ĺi…ô misabar~…ĺuńßaja ¶a tu kar~…ĺuŇč. maadińß nida ¶i kawna-r~…ĺi…ô mim…ô ¶m…ô ¶ tu kawaw, ¶aaj r~…ĺińßidai ¶inida. sakamu…ôn nida ¶iama nida sakapańß…ôn ku wajwaj ńßan, wada…ôn nida ku mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj ¶inidaan a tad…ômaw. ¶i r~…ĺi…ô mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs r~…ĺar~…ĺiw satu ¶inida, mikir~…ĺim ¶i r~…ĺik…ôn na. katawaan tu nutaw ¶i r~…ĺi…ô . pa ¶…ôbaan ni ajd…ômun r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbuan ni ajd…ô ¶ia ńßan, mapa ¶…ôba Ē~ ° ¶i k…ôr~…ĺuos…ôt…ô Ē~ ° , bańßbańß ńßantu nida ¶i ajd…ô ¶ia . . patajda ńßantu ni k…ônt…ô Ē~ ° i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni r~…ĺik…ôn , ¶i k…ôr~…ĺuos…ôt…ô Ē~ °-puo ¶…ô maadińß satu nida ¶i aws…ôńßuat…ô , masasukajna Ē~ °ńß ku nuńß…ôni, maadińß ni r~…ĺik…ôn atu a ¶awa nida ¶i kanńßua…ô kuo ¶…ôa pakadiŇč ńßantu nida ku kuku Ē~ °. . katukuńß sa ¶i r~…ĺi…ô , kja ńßidan nuńß…ôni ku tawkijaku sa, ¶aaj pit…ôŇčir~…ĺ ¶i r~…ĺik…ôn . mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶i r~…ĺi…ô , ańßi ¶an miwawi…ôs sa. tańß…ôkar~…ĺ satu ¶i kawnar~…ĺi…ô , atu ¶i r~…ĺik…ôn tatusa r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu…ôn nida ¶i wama nida. . tabaki ku tuwa Ē~ ° ni r~…ĺi…ô , majnańß tu tatajnaan nida a wawa, katuud ku miadińßaj i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik mi ¶ir~…ĺi. tańß…ôkar~…ĺ satu ¶i k…ônta Ē~ ° , maŇčar~…ĺaj midiput ¶inidaan. namabar~…ĺijan udadan satu, ¶i r~…ĺi…ô sar~…ĺiwdr~…ĺiwd sai s…ônan r~…ĺin ¶un, mar~…ĺit…ômuńß nida ¶i misaapaapaaj ¶i tanmu.pajd…ôr~…ĺan ¶i ajd…ô ¶ia ¶i ajd…ô ¶ia Ňčar~…ĺiwŇč…ôu sa, ¶i r~…ĺi…ô par~…ĺur~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu tatajnaan nida a wawaw, ¶i k…ônt…ô Ē~ ° r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida tatusa tajda i papańßanńßanan nu kakitidaan. tada tabakitu ku ¶umi, sadikudaj satu kinapataj. amapatapataj ¶i ajd…ômun kumitan…ôŇč ¶inida patar~…ĺuman tu kawaw, nika sadikudaj ¶i r~…ĺi…ô abibi…ôn nida ku kidu ni kuodir~…ĺija . ¶i r~…ĺi…ô matin…ôŇč tu ¶i k…ônt…ô Ē~ ° ¶inida sa, mar~…ĺijuńß ¶inida miwanan tu kawaw ni kajt…ô Ē~ °s…ô tu kankian. ¶i awp…ônni sakamu…ôn nida ¶i k…ônt…ô Ē~ ° atu ¶i ajd…ô ¶ia tan…ôŇč tu kamu mar~…ĺasakakaaj ńßan. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: "śĚéÁąĺÁéč" . "śĚéÁąĺÁéč"Liewan sakalaluman nu kasinganganan a kakunkuan ni Wilan.Sasepiya. nina tatusaay nida a tataynaan a wawa misakapah,pabeli hantu ni Liewan ku zaysang i tu nuhenian, hida satu sikawaw tu sakalaluman a kawawan. gagikian namakayda i 1605 a mihcaan nisulitan, inakunku' sakamusa namakayda i nakamuan tu Luo-ma tademaw nu zitayan, Pule'den kuowan Lie a kungku, nina ka kungkuan nina kuowan a cudadan, ulic a dadiw atu gagikian idaw tu i Sase-piya a zitayan. sakatusa ni kalepacawan idaw tu kina kakungkuan u sapalutatengaan nu Sasepiya sapatahekalan a natangahan a cudadan. kalaluman a picidekan ni sulitan pasayni i nu tademawan anikalaecu's atu i lalumaan naca a kankian. namusakamu ci Ciawpuona sulit sa:"inai' tu ku hatiniay tu nu tademaw mikikaka ci Lie an misulit tu sakalaluman a gagikian nu sasulitan " balakitu ku mihcaan ni Liewan mangalay tu tadikud, sipabeli kina kanatal tu tuluay a tataynaan a wawa mamin lisilud, sipabali nida ku satabakiay a kawawan tu sakanamuhan nida a tademaw. Kawna-Lie , Liken misadawmi', patinaku tu udaip nu namuh cinidaan mikikaka tu kanatal sa, ci Kuoti'-Liya kaisa misadawmi', sakamusa u ngalay han caay kaw sasakamuen sa, alaw han mapatay nu linges ci Kuowan . ci Liewan mapatay nu linges lawpes hantu nida ku sapilaylayan, benis hantu nida ku kanatal sipabeli ci Kawna-Lie atu ci Liken . sakamusa ci Kente' uynian a kawaw numisu caay palecadi, mibabelih kaku sa. mapatay nu linges ci Lie , pahutin hatu cinida palaliw. ci Lie didawan nida ci Puokenti kuocen atu ci Falansi kuowan , nina tatusaay pasayda namin ci Kuoti'-Liya mikikung kita sa. katinengan satu nuheni ci Kuoti'-Liya inai tu ku sapilaylay tu kawawan, ci Puokenti kuocen miyukiw lawpesen nida ku kakakikunngan, ci Falansi kuowan hantu tada u ngalay nida sisa kikung satu ku nnuhen. mihapu satu ci Lie aytida kaku mueneng i ci Kawna-Lie , ci Liken nan a lalacal han naku mueneng, liwanen numaku ku cacaya a lasubu nu hitay mamin kilul takuwan. ci Kawna-Lie atu ci Liken malalihud kunuheni tatusa, patahekal tu paceba' nu balucu' nuheni, sakamusa ci Lie an u caay henay kaw mamapatay a babalaki sa. mapatay nu linges ci Aydemun u bucud kaku sa, mipalula'cus cinida tu kaka ci Aydecia . pasayda cinida i wama ci Keluosete'-puoce tu tingami, sakamu hanini maanup ci Aydecia tu zaysan. . misanu kalung ci Kaye'se , ci Lie misabaluhayaca tu kalung. maadih nida ci Kawna-Lie mimecmec tu kawaw, caay lihidai cinida. sakamuen nida ciama nida sakapahen ku wayway han, wadaen nida ku mikilulay cinidaan a tademaw. ci Lie mapatay nu linges laliw satu cinida, mikilim ci Liken na. katawaan tu nutaw ci Lie . pacebaan ni Aydemun lalebuan ni Aydecia han, mapaceba' ci Keluosete' , bahbah hantu nida ci Aydecia . . patayda hantu ni Kente' i luma' ni Liken , ci Keluosete'-puoce maadih satu nida ci Awsehuate , masasukayna'h ku nuheni, maadih ni Liken atu acawa nida ci Kanhuae kuocea pakading hantu nida ku kuku'. . katukuh sa ci Lie , kya hidan nuheni ku tawkiyaku sa, caay pitengil ci Liken . mapatay nu linges ci Lie , ahican miwawies sa. tahekal satu ci Kawnalie , atu ci Liken tatusa lalebuen nida ci wama nida. . tabaki ku tuwa' ni Lie , maynah tu tataynaan nida a wawa, katuud ku miadihay i liklik micili. tahekal satu ci Kenta' , mangalay midiput cinidaan. namabaliyan udadan satu, ci Lie saliwdliwd sai senan lincun, malitemuh nida ci misaapaapaay ci Tanmu.Paydelan ci Aydecia ci Aydecia ngaliwngeu sa, ci Lie palula'cus tu tataynaan nida a wawaw, ci Kente' ladayen nida tatusa tayda i papahanhanan nu kakitidaan. tada tabakitu ku cumi, sadikuday satu kinapatay. amapatapatay ci Aydemun kumitaneng cinida pataluman tu kawaw, nika sadikuday ci Lie abibien nida ku kidu ni Kuodiliya . ci Lie matineng tu ci Kente' cinida sa, maliyuh cinida miwanan tu kawaw ni Kayte'se tu kankian. ci Awpenni sakamuen nida ci Kente' atu ci Aydecia taneng tu kamu malasakakaay han. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

¶i far~…ĺansi kuowan , nina tatusaaj pasajda namin ¶i kuoti Ē~ °-r~…ĺija mikikuŇč kita sa. katin…ôŇčan satu nuńß…ôni ¶i kuoti Ē~ °-r~…ĺija inai tu ku sapir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu kawawan, ¶i puok…ônti kuo ¶…ôn mijukiw r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn nida ku kakakikunŇčan, ¶i far~…ĺansi kuowan ńßantu tada u Ňčar~…ĺaj nida sisa kikuŇč satu ku nnuńß…ôn. mińßapu satu ¶i r~…ĺi…ô ajtida kaku mu…ôn…ôŇč i ¶i kawna-r~…ĺi…ô , ¶i r~…ĺik…ôn nan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ ńßan naku mu…ôn…ôŇč, r~…ĺiwan…ôn numaku ku ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺasubu nu ńßitaj mamin kir~…ĺur~…ĺ takuwan. ¶i kawna-r~…ĺi…ô atu ¶i r~…ĺik…ôn mar~…ĺar~…ĺińßud kunuńß…ôni tatusa, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu pa ¶…ôba Ē~ ° nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, sakamusa ¶i r~…ĺi…ô an u ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaw mamapataj a babar~…ĺaki sa. mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶i ajd…ômun u bu ¶ud kaku sa, mipar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ¶inida tu kaka ¶i ajd…ô ¶ia . pasajda ¶inida i wama ¶i k…ôr~…ĺuos…ôt…ô Ē~ °-puo ¶…ô tu tiŇčami, sakamu ńßanini maanup ¶i ajd…ô ¶ia tu zajsan. . misanu kar~…ĺuŇč ¶i kaj…ô Ē~
